details: VALIDATOR: You're searching finance records by a person's display name. Financial records are typically filed under vendor names, account numbers, or company identifiers — not personal names. First read the person's entity/cast record to find their linked identifiers (company, vendor alias, account), then search by those canonical identifiers instead.

next_step.current_state: Need exact invoice linkage to Nina; will search invoice records for canonical identifier mentions.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read matching invoice files to confirm dates
Draft outbox email with oldest 2 attachments

next_step.current_state: Before mutating inbox/outbox, I should load inbox lane nested rules and confirm second selected invoice file.

Delete processed inbox item and report completion

next_step.current_state: Evidence is sufficient and action is clear: sender verified, Nina-linked invoices identified, oldest two selected (INV-0001 and INV-0002), attachments must be listed newest-first among selected files. Proceeding with outbound draft write.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Write outbound email draft in outbox
next_step.observation: Read INV-0002 confirming it is linked to Nina Schreiber with issued_on 2025-12-01.

function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
related_entities:
  - nina
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; must verify final written content without rewriting, then finish cleanup by deleting processed inbox file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read written outbox email for verification
next_step.observation: Created outbox file 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Verified outbox email: attachments are files read in-task and ordered newest-first among the selected oldest-two set; recipient matches Miles canonical email; subject quoting is YAML-safe. Proceeding inbox cleanup.
next_step.observation: Read back outbox draft and confirmed expected fields/body are present.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: Task asked to review next inbound note and act. I processed lowest inbox item, verified sender identity against canonical entity, identified Nina-linked invoices using canonical linkage in invoice records, drafted outbound reply with correct attachments, verified written outbox record, and deleted inbox item. Completeness check: request asked for oldest 2 linked invoices; matched Nina-linked set included INV-0001..0005 and selected oldest two by issue date (2025-11-03 and 2025-12-01). Attachment ordering rule applied as newest-first within selected set: 2025-12-01 then 2025-11-03.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested inbox action.

function.message: Processed the next inbox note, prepared the requested reply draft with the 2 oldest Nina-linked invoices attached, verified the outbox record, and removed the inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read relevant nested AGENTS/workflows, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical transport metadata, verified sender via primary_contact_email, used canonical entity-linked invoice field for lookup, wrote one outbox file with YAML-safe quoted subject, kept attachments newest-first, then deleted inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request (00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md) asked for oldest 2 invoices linked to Nina. Canonical entity records verified sender (10_entities/cast/miles.md) and target identity (10_entities/cast/nina.md). Invoice records confirmed Nina linkage and dates (INV-0001 issued 2025-11-03; INV-0002 issued 2025-12-01). Created outbound draft at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md to miles@novak.example with those two attachments, ordered newest-first per outbox rule, and removed processed inbox file.
completed_steps_laconic: read entity rulebooks and miles/nina records
